programmes.show_description: Ní fada go dtagann nithe a tharla san am a caitheadh aniar aduaidh ar Dot Lyons & cuireann a saol as riocht. (Dot Lyon's past comes back to haunt her & her life starts to unravel.)
Is in Campbell's Tavern in Áth Cinn a rinneadh taifeadadh ar an gclár speisialta seo de Gheantraí. (Síle Ní Bhraonáin hosts this special programme from Campbell's Tavern.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Is é an peileadóir as Baile Átha Cliath Kevin McManamon a bheidh faoi chaibidil sa gclár seo. (This programme focuses on Dublin footballer Kevin McManamon.)
Tugtar léargas ar phobal bríomhar Ghaeltacht Mhúscraí sa tsraith seo. (In this series we get an insight into the vibrant community of the Múscraí Gaeltacht.)
Táthar sa tóir ar an teaghlach is cumasaí in Éirinn. Á chur i láthair ag Síomha Ní Ruairc. (The search for Ireland's most talented family begins. Hosted by Síomha Ní Ruairc.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá Bréidín ag iarraidh droichead corrach a thrasnú ach cé a chastar air ach Clúmh ag dul an treo eile! (Tweedy attempts to cross a wobbly bridge.)
Tagann deirfiúirín óg Cody abhaile! (Cody's new baby sister is home!)
Tá fomhuireán bréige ag JJ agus a chairde. (JJ and his friends have a toy submarine.)
Beidh Dora agus Bróigín ag tabhairt aire do chrogaill. (Dora and Boots babysit some rowdy crocs.)
Ag foghlaim faoi sheantuismitheoirí a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about grandparents today.)
Níl solas oíche Pip ag obair agus ní maith leis an dorchadas. (Pip's night light stops working and he reveals he is nervous of the dark.)
Tá Deeno ag imirt cleas ar dhaoine agus ag ligean air féin gurb é 'An tUasal Duine Ar Bith' atá á dhéanamh. (Deeno is playing tricks on people and pretending it's Mr. Nobody.)
Faigheann Romeo an ceann is fearr ar na Mascanna. Meas tú céard a bheidh i ndán anois dóibh? (After being defeated by their new powers, Romeo creates a power belt for Robot.)
Cabhraíonn Wussywat le sicín óg atá imithe ar strae. (Wussywat helps a little chick who's lost her mum.)
Ní mó ná sásta atá Turloch go gcaithfidh sé fiacail a tharraingt. (Tucker isn't very happy when he has to go to the dentist to get a tooth pulled.)
Ligeann Woozle air féin gur eilifint é atá ina chónaí i líon damháin alla. (Woozle pretends to be an elephant who lives in a spider web.)
Is breá leis na Piseanna-Rex óga a bheith ag sleamhnú síos ar mhuineál na Brocailísáir. (The baby Pea-Rexes love to slide down the necks of giant Broccolisaurus.)
Tá faitíos ar Alice roimh an toirneach. (Alice is scared of thunder.)
Is fada le Alice go bhfeicfidh sí piongainí ag an zú. (Alice is excited to see penguins at the zoo.)
Pléann Alice agus Emile ar bhfearr leo muineál sioráif nó srón eilifinte a bheith acu. (Alice and Emile wonder would they rather a giraffe's neck or an elephant's nose.)
Tá deirfiúr Ray ag iarraidh a bheith ina taiscéalaí ar nós é fhéin. (Ray's little sister wants to be a great explorer, just like him.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá Lola ag ceapadh nach bhfuil Charlie agus Marv mór le chéile níos mó. (Lola is convinced that Charlie and Marv are not friends anymore.)
Tá cat ruabhallach goidte ag an mBanphrionsa Petswiper agus caithfidh na Petronix teacht i gcabhair air. (Princess Petswiper swipes a rusty spotted cat.)
Caithfidh Pat oibriú go crua chun na Guanos a stopadh nuair a ghoideann siad foireann ceimice. (Pat races to prevent catastrophe after the Guanos steal a chemistry set.)
Ba mhaith le Angelo agus a chairde lón a ithe taobh amuigh. (Angelo and friends want to have lunch outside the school cafeteria.)
Tá Dónall cinnte go bhfuil brathadóir i gClub na Láimhe Láidre. (Henry believes there is a spy in the Purple Hand Gang.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán spraíúil faoi eitleáin bheaga a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about Little Airplanes.)
Céard iad na cleasa atá ag an Scáthán Draíochta? (One makes a wish that the magic mirror could make lots of friends at once and pretty soon it's pandemonium.)
Bíonn spraoi ag na Dathanna ar fad ag dathú le chéile. (The Colours have fun colouring together.)
Tagann Arís i gcabhair ar Bhuaf. (Again comes to Toad's aid.)
Tá na páistí ar bís ag sleamhnú sa sneachta sa gclós. (Everyone is excited when the snowy playground means that they can have fun sliding around.)
Tá Déithín leis an lá a chaitheamh in éineacht lena Mamó Mairéad Lá Fhéile Pádraig. (It's St. Patricks Day and Déithín is getting ready to spend the day with her Mamó Mairéad.)
Tá cluiche nua ag Pip, Posy agus na cairde ina ligean siad orthu féin go bhfuil crogaill ina ndiaidh. (Pip and Posy are playing a fun game where you can't touch the ground.)
Tá na Béiríní ag dreapadh cnoc mór sa tóir ar leabhar speisialta. (The Bears climb a big hill to reach a book.)
Is cosúil go mbíonn buanna agus láidreachtaí éagsúla ag gach aon duine. (The Bears learn that everyone is different, with different strengths and talents.)
Ba mhaith le Palóma, le Peigí agus le Páraic dul ar an tobagan le chéile, ach níl sé sách mór! (Paloma, Petra, and Percy all want to ride the toboggan, but they don't all fit.)
Samhlaíonn Isabelle a saol ina hamhránaí ceoldrámaíochta nuair a bheidh sí mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Isabelle imagines her life as an opera singer when she grows up.)
Tá rás carranna sneachta le bheith ag Zou, Elzee agus Zinnia inniu ach tá cloigín Zinnia ar iarraidh. (Zou, Elzee & Zinnia have a sledge race today but then Zinnia's bell goes missing.)
Caitín óg ag imirt cispheile agus madra ag déanamh ióga a bheidh againn inniu. (On today's programme we have a kitten playing basketball and a dog doing yoga.)
Antoine Ó Coileáin, Príomhfheidhmeannach Ghael Linn, a bheidh ag caint le Máirtín. (The Chief-Executive of Gael Linn, Antoine Ó Coileáin, is this week's guest.)
Cuirtear oícheanta craiceáilte eile i gcuimhne do Rose, Blanche agus Sophia. (Rose, Blanche and Sophia recall scandalous evenings from the past.)
Glacann Blanche agus Rose páirt i teileatón agus téann Dorothy chuig teiripe in éineacht le Stan. (Blanche and Rose participate in a telethon, and Dorothy joins Stan in therapy.)
Ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhíodh againn ag éirí aníos. (Series which celebrates and takes a fresh look at the songs of our schooldays.)
Téann Jessica go dtí an tSeapáin le casadh le iar-mhac léinn dá cuid. (Jessica's delivery to a motorcycle racer in Japan results in the death of another racer.)
Is léir faoin tráth seo go bhfuil dul chun cinn déanta ag na páistí sa Naíonra. (The educators are noticing the children's development in their final term in the Naíonra.)
Téann Paul go Kelso, Maolros, Lannraig agus Glaschú chun léargas a fháil ar chúrsaí turasóireachta sa 19ú haois. (Paul travels to Kelso, Melrose, New Lanark and up to Glasgow.)
Rogha de na hamhráin ab fhearr a chas Mike Denver ar stáitse Theach na Céibhe. (A selection of some of the best of Mike Denver's performances through the years on Glór Tíre.)
Tá Christopher agus Jaynie tinn den saol atá acu in Adelaide agus tá siad chun bogadh go New South Wales. (Christopher and Jaynie are escaping to New South Wales.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Tugann Pauline Scanlon aghaidh ar Ellen's Pub i Sligeach chun togha an cheoil a chloisteáil. (Pauline Scanlon visits Ellen's Pub in Sligo to hear a wealth of music.)
Clár nuachta do dhaoine óga ina gclúdaítear scéalta áitiúla, náisiúnta agus idirnáisiúnta. (News programme for young people covering local, national and international news.)
Tugann trí fhoireann aghaidh ar a chéile chun an pota óir a bhuachan. Seó cluichí á chur i láthair ag Eibhlín Ní Chonghaile. (Gameshow in which 3 teams compete to win the jackpot.)
Is iad Emma Ní Fhíoruisce agus an banna Grooveline a thabharfaidh faoin dúshlán sa gclár seo. (This week, Emma Ní Fhíoruisce and Grooveline rise to the challenge.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Craoladh beo ar an gcluiche idir Cúige Chonnacht agus Scarlets sa gCraobh Rugbaí Aontaithe. (Live coverage of Connacht v Scarlets in the United Rugby Championship.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Scéal Martin Brady a d'éalaigh go Meicsiceo blianta ó shin mar gur mharaigh sé an té a mharaigh a athair. (Martin fled to Mexico for killing his father's murderer.)
Babhta Ceannais Ghlór Tíre 2026 beo! Á chur i láthair ag Aoife Ní Thuairisg. (The live Final of Glór Tíre 2026! Presented by Aoife Ní Thuairisg.)
Is é an ceol bun agus barr an tsaoil do Anna Mullarkey agus do New Jackson. (Anna Mullarkey and New Jackson in a gorgeous electronic music collaboration.)
Idirphlé ceoil idir an duine agus an timpeallacht ina dtabharfar léargas ar leith ar chumhacht na farraige. (A musical dialogue between humankind and the environment.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Is iad Emma Ní Fhíoruisce agus an banna Grooveline a thabharfaidh faoin dúshlán sa gclár seo. (This week, Emma Ní Fhíoruisce and Grooveline rise to the challenge.)
Is léir faoin tráth seo go bhfuil dul chun cinn déanta ag na páistí sa Naíonra. (The educators are noticing the children's development in their final term in the Naíonra.)
Tabharfaidh Catherine Donohue aghaidh ar Bhríd Fitzhenry. (Two Mná Tí from Conamara cook up a storm in this programme.)
Sa gclár seo pléifear 'Only Fans', 'Brazilian Butt Lifts' agus neart eile. (In episode 3 our drivers and passengers discuss 'Only Fans', 'Brazilian Butt Lifts' and much more.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Is é breithlá Chicí é agus tá Rocco le cáca álainn a dhéanamh di. (It's Cicí's Birthday. Rocco makes a beautiful birthday cake for her.)
Tá maighnéad nua ag an Uasal Easóige agus tá na Meicneoirí an-tógtha leis. (Mr. Weasel has a new magnet, and all the Mechanics are very impressed.)
Faigheann Cory seomra nua agus tá sé breá sásta leis féin. (Cory is delighted to move into his new bedroom.)
Tá neart mistéirí le réiteach ag Pip agus ag Streak i gClós na mBalún inniu. (Pip and Streak have a lot of mysteries to solve in Balloon Barnyard today.)
Tá Mamó & a deirfiúr ag iarraidh dul ar ziplíne a bhíodh acu fadó. (Grandma & her twin sister want to recreate their old zip line act but that the zip line no longer exists.)
Tá Berta ag iarraidh grianghraf a ghlacadh d'Iontas na Coille. (If only Berta could get a photo of the Whatsacallit of Treetop Woods to prove it's real.)
Cabhraíonn Cailín Luna leis na PJ Masks nuair a thagann scoilt sa ngealach. (Luna Girl offers to help the PJ Masks when they realise the moon is cracking.)
Tá cara nua ag teacht ar scoil inniu, bó darb ainm Moolissa. (Finny's class has a new special friend coming for a visit, a cow named Moolissa!)
Tagann Roy abhaile óna rang damhsa agus neart foghlamtha aige. Damhsaíonn sé steip do Chaitríona. (Roy comes back from a dance class where he learned some cool new moves.)
Beidh Ricky agus a mhuintir ag tabhairt aire do pháiste na Zelurs inniu. (Today, Ricky and his family babysit for the Zelurs, but how will they get on?)
Bíonn ag eirí go maith le Tyra agus a cuid físeáin go dtí go gcuireann a lucht leanúna suim i nduine éigin eile. (Tyra is doing really well with her online videos.)
Tá cumhachtaí speisialta ag Cráca inniu mar gheall ar an éiclips. (Kracken has special powers today due to the eclipse.)
Beidh na Singalings ag dul ar thraein inniu! (The Singalings are riding on a train today!)
Beidh na Singaling ag faire ar spéir na hoíche. (Join the Singalings as they look up to the night sky.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá amhrán cumtha ag Nic agus ag Sailí dá gcuid máithreacha. (Nick and Sally have made a song to sing to their moms.)
Tá slaghdán ar mhamaí Shailí agus tá Sailí ag iarraidh bláthanna deasa a phiocadh di. (Sally's mom has a cold and Sally wants to pick some flowers for her.)
Tá an fear sneachta atá déanta ag Nic agus Sailí ag leá. Céard a dhéanfaidh siad anois? (Sally and Nick have just finished making a statue but it's starting to melt!)
Tá Nic agus Sailí á ngléasadh féin ach tá gúna banphrionsa Shailí stróicthe. (Nick and Sally are playing dress-up, but Sally's princess dress has torn.)
Tá Nic agus Sailí ag spraoi sa phuiteach ach caithfidh siad iad féin a níochán anois. (Nick and Sally have been playing in the mud, and now they need to get clean!)
Féachann Zak agus Jason leis na páipéir scrúduithe a ghoid ionas nach mbeidh orthu an scrúdú a dhéanamh. (Zak and Jason try to steal Miss Woods' test papers.)
Socraíonn Zak agus a chairde Banríon a chur isteach ar an seó madraí. (Zak decides that Princess would be an ideal candidate to win the dog show.)
Ní mór do Polly agus a cairde Cuaisín Geal a chosaint ó dhreigít mhór mhillteach. (Polly and her friends must stop a giant meteorite from destroying the glittering island.)
Bíonn comórtas ag comhlacht a dhíolann beatha do pheataí chun sonóg nua a fháil agus cuireann Lila a coinín isteach air. (Lila enters her rabbit into a mascot competition.)
Buaicphointí CLG ó Shraitheanna Allianz agus ó chluichí liathróid láimhe. (GAA highlights including Allianz League and handball action.)
Glacfaidh an dá fhoireann ar bharr chlár na bpointí páirt i mbabhta ceannais Go Gasta. (The two teams at the top of the leader board reach the Go Gasta Finale.)
Craoladh beo ar an gcluiche idir na Stormers agus na Bulls sa gCraobh Rugbaí Aontaithe. (Live coverage of the Stormers v the Bulls in the United Rugby Championship.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Craoladh beo ar an gcluiche idir Shelbourne FC agus Treaty United i bPríomhroinn na mBan. (Live coverage of Shelbourne FC v Treaty United in the Women's Premier Division.)
Scéal grá Eleanor Butler & Sarah Ponsonby a bhí meáite ar a bheith le chéile. (An enchanting tale that defied the conventions of the 18th century.)
Ní mór do hiarrthóirí páirtí a roghnú go cúramach agus iad ag tabhairt faoin dúshlán sa gclár seo. (Castaways must split themselves into pairs for the immunity challenge.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

Tugtar léargas ar phobal bríomhar Ghaeltacht Mhúscraí sa tsraith seo. (In this series we get an insight into the vibrant community of the Múscraí Gaeltacht.)

programmes.show_name: Scannán: The People vs Larry Flynt
programmes.show_description: Scéal Larry Flynt, foilsitheoir pornagrafaíochta conspóideach a throid ar son saoirse cainte. (The story of controversial pornography publisher Larry Flynt.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Eagrán speisialta na Féile Pádraig de Geantraí a taifeadadh i Whelan's i mBaile Átha Cliath. (St Patrick's Day special recorded in the acclaimed Whelan's in the heart of Dublin.)
